title: euphrasia randii var. reeksii
intro: Euphrasia randii var. reeksii, also known as the New Zealand eyebright or marsh eyebright, is a plant species native to New Zealand. It is a perennial herb belonging to the family Orobanchaceae and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly to treat eye and respiratory problems. The plant contains bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, providing health benefits such as reducing eye inflammation, improving respiratory health, and supporting immune function. Euphrasia randii var. reeksii is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are typically consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
